reference: I am Sudha Bajpai, aged forty-six. Two years ago, I started feeling that everything was dirty around me, and I refrained from walking on the road. I did not even like people coming to my house with shoes on. Lately, the problem has increased, and every time I use the toilet, I take a bath and clean the toilet even after urinating. I feel depressed and want to cry. I can't even concentrate or divert my mind to any other activities. I feel everyone is unhygienic after using the restroom. Is there a cure for my problem? Please advise. I am a resident of Dehradun.
text: I am Suda Bajpai, aged 46. Two years ago, I started feeling that everything was dirty around me, and I refrained from walking on the road. I did not even like people coming to my house with shoes on. Lately, the problem has increased, and every time I use the toilet, I take a bath and clean the toilet even after urinating. I feel depressed and want to cry. I can't concentrate or divert my mind to any other activities. I feel everyone is unhygienic after using the restroom. Is there a cure for my problem? Please advise. I am a resident of Dehradun.
